addToken(address).details: Only callable by the contract owner. The token address must be non-zero and not      already whitelisted. Once added, tokens cannot be removed.

params.token: Address of the ERC20 token to whitelist.

cancelOperation(uint256).details: Only the original creator of the operation may cancel it. The operation must be Active.      tokenA is returned from escrow to the creator. Protected by nonReentrant.

params.operationId: The ID of the operation to cancel.

completeOperation(uint256).details: The caller must have approved at least `op.amountB` of `op.tokenB` to this contract.      The operation must be Active. The caller cannot be the original creator.      tokenB is transferred directly from the caller to the creator (not through escrow).      tokenA is transferred from escrow to the caller. Protected by nonReentrant.

params.operationId: The ID of the operation to complete.

createOperation(address,address,uint256,.details: The caller must have approved at least `amountA` of `tokenA` to this contract      before calling this function. Both tokens must be whitelisted and amounts must be      greater than zero. Protected by nonReentrant.

params.amountA: Amount of tokenA to deposit into escrow.
params.amountB: Amount of tokenB required from the completer to fulfill the swap.
params.tokenA: Address of the ERC20 token the caller is offering.
params.tokenB: Address of the ERC20 token the caller is requesting.

returns._0: Array of all Operation structs (Active, Closed, and Cancelled).
Array of all ERC20 token addresses that have been approved by the owner.

owner().details: Returns the address of the current owner.

renounceOwnership().details: Leaves the contract without owner. It will not be possible to call `onlyOwner` functions. Can only be called by the current owner. NOTE: Renouncing ownership will leave the contract without an owner, thereby disabling any functionality that is only available to the owner.

transferOwnership(address).details: Transfers ownership of the contract to a new account (`newOwner`). Can only be called by the current owner.

addToken(address).notice: Adds an ERC20 token to the whitelist, enabling its use in swap operations.

allowedTokens(address).notice: Returns true if the token address has been whitelisted by the owner.

allowedTokensList(uint256).notice: Ordered list of all whitelisted token addresses.

cancelOperation(uint256).notice: Cancels an active operation and refunds tokenA to the creator.

completeOperation(uint256).notice: Completes an active swap: the caller provides tokenB and receives tokenA.

createOperation(address,address,uint256,.notice: Creates a new swap operation by depositing tokenA into the escrow.

getAllOperations().notice: Returns all swap operations ever created, regardless of status.

getAllowedTokens().notice: Returns the complete list of whitelisted token addresses.

operations(uint256).notice: Array of all swap operations indexed by operation ID.
